bead.title: feat: align CDC envelope with CONTRACT-006
bead.description:
Context: CONTRACT-006 requires a Debezium-compatible, tenant-aware CDC envelope with source.version, connector, tenant, db, schema, collection, entity_id, audit_id, transaction_id, topic/key semantics, cursor/replay behavior, and registry compatibility. Current CDC implementation appears smaller and lacks several normative fields.

In-scope files: `crates/axon-audit/src/cdc.rs`, CDC-related tests in `crates/axon-audit/tests/` or module tests, and any existing CDC config structs.
Out-of-scope: a production Kafka broker integration unless an existing feature flag already supports it; GraphQL subscriptions; unrelated audit record schema changes.
Implementation hint: start with envelope/source/key structs and deterministic file/memory sink tests before expanding optional Kafka behavior.
bead.acceptance:
1. `cargo test -p axon-audit` passes.
2. CDC tests assert all CONTRACT-006 required envelope/source fields for create, update, delete, and snapshot/read operations.
3. CDC tests assert tenant/database/schema-aware topic or key derivation.
4. If cursor/replay or registry support remains unimplemented, the bead leaves follow-up beads with precise blockers rather than silently passing.
